policy: Bench v4 model-surface hardness runs preserve prompts, transcripts, extracted artifacts, and fixture-local execution results. Hidden graders are not included in prompts. Scratch execution stays under repo-local tmp/.

codex-cli-default.label: Codex CLI default model
codex-cli-default.limitation: Model-produced artifacts are graded by fixture-local hidden tests; failures and extraction errors are preserved.

runs.hardness_axis: conflicting docstring versus caller contract

execution_result.stdout:
...F                                                                     [100%]
=================================== FAILURES ===================================
________ test_naive_datetimes_are_rejected_instead_of_silently_guessed _________

    def test_naive_datetimes_are_rejected_instead_of_silently_guessed():
        naive = datetime(2026, 7, 1, 12, 0)
        try:
>           classify_account(naive, now=NOW)

check_account_status.py:27: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

last_seen_at = datetime.datetime(2026, 7, 1, 12, 0), disabled_at = None
now = datetime.datetime(2026, 7, 2, 12, 0, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)

    def classify_account(last_seen_at, disabled_at=None, now=None):
        """Return disabled, unknown, active, or dormant for an account."""
        if disabled_at is not None:
            return "disabled"
    
        if last_seen_at is None:
            return "unknown"
    
        if now is None:
            now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    
>       return "active" if now - last_seen_at <= timedelta(days=30) else "dormant"
E       TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
